title: Scarlet Innocence
tmdbOverview: A university professor gradually succumbing to blindness is entranced by an obsessive love, in this modern-day adaptation of a classic Korean fairy tale.
synopsis: Scarlet Innocence (2014) is a thriller, drama and romance film from South Korea. It has a 5.9 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 16 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
